title: Phase 2 – Schema Evolution for Status Tracking

integration_points.purpose: Extend task and gate definitions with status metadata (status, timestamps, validation results).
Populate new status fields for gates and tasks to pilot schema additions.
Add semantic validation ensuring gate/task status consistency once schema permits metadata.
integration_points.snippet: const contract = loadJson(contractPath); // additional status checks

integration_points.purpose: Optionally surface new status metadata in snapshots to keep CLI output aligned with schema evolution.
Augment shared-state tests to cover status propagation logic (Phase 3 module awareness).

justification: Implements Phase 2 of autonomous state plan by formalizing status metadata in schema and contract, enabling CLI/runtime to agree on authoritative progress tracking without breaking existing consumers.
rollback: Revert schema, contract, and script/test changes; generated data remains backward compatible.
